info.title: Workloads Client
info.description: Workloads client provides access to various workload operations.

get.description: Gets all Virtual Instance resources in a Subscription.
Gets all Virtual Instance resources in a Resource Group.

parameters.name: virtualInstanceName
parameters.description: The name of the Virtual Instance resource

AuxiliaryResourceConfiguration.description:
Defines the configuration for auxiliary resources required by workload platform services.
Use 'Manual' to explicitly specify resource IDs.

configurationType.description: The type of auxiliary resource configuration.

AuxiliaryResourceConfigurationType.description:
The type of auxiliary resource configuration. Determines how auxiliary resources
are specified for workload operations.

values.name: Manual
values.description: User provides all required auxiliary resource IDs explicitly.

AuxiliaryStorageAccountConfiguration.description: Defines the storage account configuration for auxiliary resources.

storageAccountId.description:
The Azure resource ID of the storage account.
Required on create, optional on update.

ChangeDetection.description: Defines the change detection information including configuration and errors.

configuration.description:
The configuration settings for change detection functionality.
If not provided, the service automatically enables change detection with default settings
(state: Enabled, frequency: PT1H) and returns the configuration in the response.

errors.description: Indicates any change detection related errors on the Virtual Instance resource.

ChangeDetectionConfiguration.description: Defines the configuration settings for change detection functionality.

state.description:
The state of the Change Detection (CD) functionality.
When set to 'Enabled', the system will execute CD based on the configured frequency.
When set to 'Disabled', CD processing will be skipped entirely.
Required on create, optional on update. Defaults to 'Disabled' if not provided on create.

frequency.description:
Specifies how frequently the Change Detection (CD) process should run.
The value must be an ISO 8601 duration string between 1 hour (PT1H) and 1 day (P1D).
Examples: "PT1H" (1 hour), "PT6H" (6 hours), "P1D" (1 day).
Defaults to "PT1H" if not provided.

ChangeDetectionState.description: Defines the state of change detection functionality.

values.name: Enabled
values.description: Change detection is enabled and will run based on the configured frequency.

values.name: Disabled
values.description: Change detection is disabled and will not run.

ComponentProfile.description:
Defines the base component profile. The profile type determines the specific
configuration properties available for each workload component type.

profileType.description:
The type of the component profile. This value determines the expected structure
of the profile properties and must be compatible with the componentType.

ComponentProfileType.description: Defines the type of component profile.

values.name: SAP_CentralServices_Default
values.description: SAP Central Services component profile.

values.name: SAP_ApplicationServer_Default
values.description: SAP Application Server component profile.

values.name: SAP_DatabaseServer_Default
values.description: SAP Database Server component profile.

DiscoveryConfiguration.description:
Defines the base configuration for automated discovery. The discovery type determines
the specific configuration properties available for each discovery workflow.

discoveryType.description:
The type of discovery to execute. This value determines the expected structure
of the configuration and must be compatible with the workloadType specified in workloadInfo.

mode.description:
The execution mode for the discovery process.
When set to 'Execute', the discovery process will be executed as part of this request.
When set to 'Skip', only the configuration is updated without running discovery.
Defaults to 'Execute' if not provided.

DiscoveryConfigurationType.description: Defines the type of discovery configuration.

values.name: SAPAPI
values.description: SAP API discovery type for discovering SAP systems via API calls.

DiscoveryExecutionMode.description: Defines the execution mode for discovery operations.

values.name: Execute
values.description: Execute the discovery process as part of this request.

values.name: Skip
values.description: Skip the discovery process; only update configuration without running discovery.

values.name: NonProduction
values.description: Non Production system.

values.name: Production
values.description: Production system.

values.name: DisasterRecovery
values.description: Disaster recovery system.

HanaDbProperties.description: Defines the HANA database specific properties.

instanceNumber.description: The SAP HANA instance number. Must be a two-digit number from 00 to 99.

databases.description: The list of HANA database instances.

LinkType.description: Defines the link type applicable for the linked resources.

values.name: Dependency
values.description: Indicates the Dependency link type.

values.name: DisasterRecovery
values.description: Indicates the Disaster Recovery link type.

resourceId.description: ARM ID of the linked resource. The ARM IDs must belong to the resources of type 'Microsoft.Workloads/virtualInstances'.

ManualAuxiliaryResourceConfiguration.description:
Defines the manual auxiliary resource configuration where the user explicitly
provides all required resource IDs such as storage accounts.

storageAccount.description:
The storage account to use for workload operations such as discovery and change detection.
Required on create, optional on update.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The succeeded provisioning state.

values.name: Updating
values.description: The updating provisioning state.

values.name: Creating
values.description: The Creating provisioning state.

values.name: Failed
values.description: The Failed provisioning state.

values.name: Deleting
values.description: The Deleting provisioning state.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The Canceled provisioning state.

SapApiDiscoveryConfiguration.description: Defines the SAP API discovery configuration for discovering SAP systems via API calls.

vmResourceId.description:
The Azure resource ID of the virtual machine to use for SAP API discovery.
Required on create, optional on update.
Only application server or central server Vm Resource Id supported as input.

SapApplicationServerDefaultComponentProf.description: Defines the SAP Application Server default component profile.

instanceNumber.description: The SAP instance number. Must be a two-digit number from 00 to 99.

hostname.description: The hostname of the SAP instance.

ipAddress.description: The IP address of the SAP instance.

SapCentralServicesDefaultComponentProfil.description: Defines the SAP Central Services default component profile.

instanceNumber.description: The SAP instance number. Must be a two-digit number from 00 to 99.

hostname.description: The hostname of the SAP instance.

ipAddress.description: The IP address of the SAP instance.

SapDatabaseInstanceConfiguration.description: Defines the database instance configuration for SAP Database Server.

SapDatabaseServerDefaultComponentProfile.description: Defines the SAP Database Server default component profile.

hostname.description: The hostname of the database server.

ipAddress.description: The IP address of the database server.

SapDispatcherConfiguration.description: Defines the dispatcher configuration for SAP Application Server.

SapEnqueueServerConfiguration.description: Defines the enqueue server configuration for SAP Central Services.

SapGatewayConfiguration.description: Defines the gateway configuration for SAP components.

SapHighAvailabilityConfiguration.description: Defines the high availability configuration for SAP components.

isHaActive.description: Indicates whether high availability is active.

haNodes.description: The list of high availability node names.

SapIcmConfiguration.description: Defines the ICM (Internet Communication Manager) configuration for SAP Application Server.

SapMessageServerConfiguration.description: Defines the message server configuration for SAP Central Services.

internalPort.description: The internal port for the message server.

httpPort.description: The HTTP port for the message server.

httpsPort.description: The HTTPS port for the message server.

SystemLifecycleStage.description: Defines the possible values for system lifecycle stage.

values.name: Active
values.description: The stage indicating that the workload system is fully built, and is up & running.

values.name: InActive
values.description: The stage indicating that the workload system is fully built but either not running or being decommissioned.

values.name: InBuild
values.description: The stage indicating that the workload system is being built.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

kind.description: Metadata used by portal/tooling/etc to render different UX experiences for resources of the same type; e.g. ApiApps are a kind of Microsoft.Web/sites type.  If supported, the resource provider must validate and persist this value.

VirtualInstanceListResult.description: The response of a VirtualInstance list operation.

value.description: The VirtualInstance items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

VirtualInstanceProperties.description: Defines the Virtual Instance resource properties.

workloadInfo.description:
The workload specific information including the workload type, definition ID and version.
Required on create, optional on update.

environmentType.description:
The type of environment in which the workload system is deployed - Production / Non Production.
Required on create, optional on update.

environmentLabel.description: The user defined label indicating the sub category of the environment in which the workload system is deployed.

systemPriority.description: The priority of the workload system. The value must be an integer between 0 (highest priority) and 9 (lowest priority).

systemLifecycleStage.description:
The current stage in the lifecycle of the workload system.
Required on create, optional on update.

metadata.description: Metadata pertaining to the workload system.

linkedResources.description: The list of the linked resource objects.

discoveryConfiguration.description: Defines the automated discovery input configuration.

changeDetection.description: Defines the change detection information including configuration and errors.

auxiliaryResourceConfiguration.description: Defines the configuration for auxiliary resource that will be used for mission critical workload platform services.

complianceState.description: Defines the compliance state of the virtual instance, as per the corresponding workload definition and architecture.

enrollmentState.description: Defines the enrollment state of the virtual instance, as per the corresponding workload definition.

enrollmentErrors.description: Indicates any enrollment related errors on the Virtual Instance resource.

provisioningState.description: Defines the virtual instance provisioning state.

errors.description: Indicates any errors on the Virtual Instance resource.

VirtualInstanceUpdate.description: Defines the request body for updating the Virtual Instance resource.

tags.description: Gets or sets the Resource tags.

WorkloadComplianceState.description: Defines the Virtual Instance compliance state.

values.name: NonCompliant
values.description: Not compliant as per the workload definition.

values.name: Compliant
values.description: Compliant as per the workload definition.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

WorkloadComponentListResult.description: The response of a WorkloadComponent list operation.

value.description: The WorkloadComponent items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

componentType.description:
Type of the component. Allowed values change based on the workload type and will be defined in the workload definition. Examples include "application", "database", "central" etc.
Required on create, read-only thereafter.

componentRole.description:
Role of the component. There can be multiple roles for a same component type. Allowed values change based on the workload type and will be defined in the workload definition. Examples of Role for SAP workloads include "pas"/"aas" for application component, "ascs"/"ers" for central component, "backup", etc.
Required on create, read-only thereafter.

resources.description:
Resources that are part of the component. The entries in this list should be unique and correspond to a single Azure resource.
Required on create, optional on update.

componentProfile.description:
The component profile containing workload-specific configuration details.
The profile type varies based on the workload and component type.

complianceState.description: Defines the compliance state of the workload component, as per the corresponding workload definition and architecture.

enrollmentState.description: Defines the enrollment state of the workload component, as per the corresponding workload definition.

enrollmentErrors.description: Indicates any enrollment related errors on the workload component resource.

provisioningState.description: Defines the workload component provisioning state.

errors.description: Indicates any errors on the workload component resource.

WorkloadComponentUpdate.description: Defines the request body for updating the workload component resource.

tags.description: Gets or sets the Resource tags.

WorkloadEnrollmentState.description: Defines the enrollment state of a Virtual Instance / Component as per the workload definition.

values.name: NeedsAttention
values.description: Indicates the state where the VI / Component isn't fully following the workload definition and thus, enrollment needing attention.

values.name: Completed
values.description: Indicates the state where the VI / Component is fully following the workload definition and thus, enrollment being complete.

workloadType.description: The type of the workload. Required on create, read-only thereafter.

workloadDefinitionName.description: The name of the corresponding workload definition. Required on create, read-only thereafter.

workloadDefinitionVersion.description: The version selected for the corresponding workload definition. Can be updated.

WorkloadResourceId.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.
